tasks: What is the combined total sample size across the two pretests and three main studies?
In Study 1, what is the exact p-value for the Warmth relative value × Familiarity interaction? Report only the number rounded to three decimal places.
In Study 2, what is the unstandardized coefficient (b) for the extremity predictor in the differential similarity model using general valence? Report only the number rounded to two decimal places.
In Study 3, what are the model-estimated means of emergent traits for Novel vs. Not Novel familiarity groups? Report only the number rounded to one decimal places.
